items.summary: Add a backend data model and API to log sexual activity entries. Each entry should store: date, whether protection was used (boolean), and optional notes. Support create, read, update, and delete operations. Associate entries with the authenticated user.

Extend the backend to return a safe/unsafe sex period status for any given date, based on the user's cycle data and fertility phase calculations. Return one of: 'safe', 'unsafe', or 'caution' based on whether the date falls in the menstrual/luteal phase (safe), fertile window/ovulation (unsafe), or transition days (caution).

Add a new 'Intimacy' page accessible from the main navigation. The page must include: (1) A safe/unsafe sex period indicator showing today's status with color-coded visual (green = safe, red = unsafe, yellow = caution), along with a brief explanation of why that period is safe or not. (2) A sexual activity log section where users can add, view, edit, and delete entries (date, protection used toggle, optional notes). Apply the existing rose/blush/cream warm theme consistently.

Add React Query hooks in useQueries.ts to wire the new Intimacy page to the backend: hooks for fetching all sexual activity entries, creating a new entry, updating an entry, deleting an entry, and fetching the safe-sex status for today's date.
